subcodes.first_line: O Qhulam Qabl-'Alí! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison once again, for verily it draweth thee nigh unto My court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام قبل علی اسمع ندائی من شطر سجنی مره اخری انه یقربک الی بساطی
subcodes.subjects: @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
